semantic.role: Pipeline orchestration task that executes the post-commit derivation stage of the ArchSpine mirror system. It composes sub-tasks for reverse indexing, aggregation, knowledge graph generation, and view derivation, then writes the control plane README and final artifacts.
responsibilities: Run the reverse indexing sub-task (ReverseIndexingTask) to build term-to-document mappings.
Run the aggregation sub-task (AggregationTask) to summarize module-level properties.
Run the knowledge graph sub-task (KnowledgeGraphTask) to generate module dependency graphs.
Run the view derivation sub-task (ViewDerivationTask) to produce human-readable views (e.g., agent briefing, diagnostics).
Write the .spine/README.md file that describes the control plane for AI agents.
Clear prior view artifacts before regeneration to ensure a clean output set.
Save the god doc (comprehensive module documentation) to the output manager.
Orchestrate sub-tasks in a defined order and handle their lifecycle via shared TaskRunner instances.
outOfScope: CLI command parsing or direct user interaction.
Core pipeline scheduling beyond this single stage.
HTTP server or MCP tool definitions.
Direct manipulation of the file system beyond artifact writing.
Performing the actual analysis algorithms (delegated to sub-tasks).
invariants: PostCommitDerivationTask must run only after a commit stage completes (i.e., it receives CommitStageOutput as input).

Sub-tasks are executed sequentially and independently; failures in one should not prevent others from being attempted (but current code does not show error handling — assume sequential with possible early exit).
The control plane README and all view artifacts are overwritten on each execution.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Introduce a dedicated pipeline stage that consolidates all derivation work after a commit, ensuring the .spire control plane is always up-to-date and consistent.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: 4a75a38 fix: resolve ESLint errors, E2E prompt injection, and better-sqlite3 compat – this commit likely addressed lint issues and compatibility but did not alter the semantic role or public surface of this file.

publicSurface.description: Exported class that orchestrates the post-commit derivation pipeline. Consumers (e.g., the main pipeline) instantiate this task and run it via TaskRunner after a commit. It executes reverse indexing, aggregation, knowledge graph generation, view derivation, and writes the control plane README.
